description: Extend semantic search to 1.3M+ S3 videos using existing cobry captions + embeddings. Add lead-specific sample curation workflow.

userStories.title: Formalize video_index table migration + match function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the video_index table formalized as a migration and the match_video_index RPC function created.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates video_index: id uuid PK, s3_bucket text NOT NULL, s3_key text NOT NULL, dataset_id uuid nullable FK, caption_text text, embedding extensions.vector(768), enrichment_source text, indexed_at timestamptz
Unique constraint on (s3_bucket, s3_key)

match_video_index(query_embedding vector(768), match_count int, filter_bucket text DEFAULT NULL, match_threshold float DEFAULT 0.40) returns (id, s3_bucket, s3_key, caption_text, similarity, enrichment_source)
Function uses cosine distance, filters embedding IS NOT NULL and similarity >= threshold
Function marked SECURITY DEFINER to bypass RLS
No HNSW index yet (deferred to US-205b)
TypeScript type VideoIndexRecord in src/types/data-catalog.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Table already exists from PoC — formalize + add match function. Use Supabase MCP for migration.

userStories.title: Cobry caption loader — Python script for mv-abaka + mv-artlist
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Python script that reads cobry caption parquets and bulk-loads them into video_index with 768-dim embeddings.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/load_cobry_captions.py — standalone Python (no TS wrapper)
Uses pyarrow read_row_group() streaming — never loads entire parquet into memory
Calls OpenAI via openai Python SDK with dimensions=768
Upserts to Supabase via httpx POST to PostgREST with service-role key
Checkpoint file at scripts/.cobry_checkpoint.json for crash recovery
Extracts clip_storage_key → s3_key, text_short + text → caption_text
Strips s3://bucket/ prefix from keys
Flags: --bucket, --delivery, --limit, --dry-run via argparse
Uses boto3 paginator for S3 listing
Idempotent — upsert on (s3_bucket, s3_key) conflict = skip
Temp files deleted in finally block after processing each parquet
Runtime check: Python 3.10+, pyarrow, openai, httpx, boto3 — exit with clear error if missing
Summary log: Inserted X / skipped Y / failed Z
userStories.notes: This is the big one — ~800k abaka + ~200k artlist. PoC TS script exists at scripts/load-cobry-captions.ts for reference.

userStories.title: Troveo metadata loader
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a script that reads troveo per-video metadata JSONs and loads them into video_index.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/load-troveo-metadata.ts created
Reads embedding parquets to get storage_key + meta_key mappings
Fetches metadata JSON per video, constructs caption from technical fields
Generates 768-dim OpenAI embedding from caption text
Upserts into video_index with enrichment_source = 'troveo_metadata'
Flags: --limit, --dry-run. Idempotent
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ~112k videos. Troveo metadata is technical only — captions will be sparse.

userStories.title: Annotation platform loader
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a script that reads annotation JSONs from completed tasks and loads into video_index.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/load-annotation-platform.ts created
Lists video_capture/completed/ and video-capture-activities/completed/ folders
Reads annotation JSON, extracts generalData fields, constructs caption
Generates 768-dim OpenAI embedding
Upserts with enrichment_source = 'annotation_json'
Maps dataset_id to Egocentric Activity Capture where path matches
Flags: --limit, --dry-run. Idempotent
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: ML-datasets caption loader
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a script to load captions from moonvalley-ml-datasets sources.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/load-ml-dataset-captions.ts created
Handles ShareGPT4Video JSONs (extract video[0].content)
Handles backup-caption-parquets movie_clips and tv_clips parquets
Generates 768-dim OpenAI embedding from caption text
Upserts with enrichment_source = 'ml_dataset_caption'
Flag: --source to select format, --limit, --dry-run. Idempotent
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Gemini Vision for mv-xtr-external uncaptioned videos
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Gemini enrichment for the ~1,257 videos with no metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/enrich-xtr-gemini.ts created — reuses Phase 1 Gemini client
Lists video files in mv-xtr-external (asteria/, david_darg/, paul_trillo/)
For each: signed URL → Gemini 2.5 Flash → caption text → 768-dim embedding
Upserts with enrichment_source = 'gemini_vision'
p-limit max 5, exponential backoff on 429
Flags: --limit, --dry-run. Idempotent
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build HNSW index on video_index after bulk loading
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the HNSW vector index built after all data is loaded.
acceptanceCriteria: Run CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY on video_index using hnsw vector_cosine_ops — outside transaction
Set hnsw.ef_search = 100 in match_video_index function
Document: 1.3M rows x 768 dims = ~4-6 GB index memory
Verify queries return in < 500ms after build
userStories.notes: Must run AFTER all loader scripts complete

userStories.title: Lead custom samples — table + RLS policies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the lead_custom_samples table with RLS for portal access.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration: lead_custom_samples with lead_id FK CASCADE, video_index_id FK SET NULL, dataset_sample_id FK SET NULL, s3_bucket, s3_key (denormalized), added_by, note, added_at
RLS on lead_custom_samples: EXISTS(leads WHERE lead_id match AND supabase_user_id = auth.uid())
RLS on video_index: EXISTS through lead_custom_samples + leads + auth.uid()
video_index RLS enabled
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ON DELETE SET NULL preserves curation if index row deleted

userStories.title: Lead custom samples — admin API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints to add, list, bulk-add, and remove custom samples.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/admin/leads/[id]/custom-samples — single add, validates UUID, service-role client
POST /api/admin/leads/[id]/custom-samples/bulk — bulk add in one transaction, returns { inserted, skipped }
GET /api/admin/leads/[id]/custom-samples — list with signed URLs
DELETE /api/admin/leads/[id]/custom-samples/[sampleId] — remove
All routes require verifyAdminToken(), validate [id] as z.string().uuid()
Denormalizes s3_bucket + s3_key from video_index at insert time
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add to Lead — single-add combobox on result cards
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to add a single search result to a lead via searchable combobox.
acceptanceCriteria: Each result card has Add to Lead button → searchable combobox with type-ahead
Fetches leads where status = 'approved'
On open: checks existing assignments, greyed leads with checkmark
After selecting: note input + Confirm button (note optional)
Success: checkmark + 'Added to [name]'. Error: inline error with retry
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add to Lead — bulk-add with checkboxes + floating action bar
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to select multiple results and add them all to a lead at once.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkbox on each result card
1+ selected: floating bar at bottom '[N] selected — Add to Lead [combobox] [note] [Confirm]'
Bulk confirm calls POST /api/admin/leads/[id]/custom-samples/bulk
After add: checkboxes cleared, bar hidden, toast '[N] samples added to [lead name]'

Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Portal 'Curated for You' section
userStories.description: As a lead, I want custom samples picked for me shown in the portal catalog.
acceptanceCriteria: Portal catalog queries lead_custom_samples (user client, RLS) then video_index details (service-role)
Section between header and CatalogBrowser, heading 'Curated for You'
Horizontal scrollable row, max 6 visible
Card: 16:9 thumbnail, caption_text 2-line truncation, bucket badge, admin note
Cards with no dataset_id are not clickable
Signed URLs generated server-side
Hidden entirely if no custom samples
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: MCP tool: search_full_catalog + updated build_lead_brief
userStories.description: As a Claude agent, I need MCP tools for full corpus search.
acceptanceCriteria: Register search_full_catalog: { query, limit?, s3_bucket?, match_threshold? }
Embeds query → match_video_index RPC → signed URLs (600s TTL)
Output: { id, s3_bucket, s3_key, caption_text, similarity, enrichment_source, signed_url }
scrubS3Urls on caption_text only — signed_url preserved via PRESERVED_KEYS
build_lead_brief includes full_corpus results labelled source: 'full_corpus'

userStories.title: Admin search: UnifiedSearchResult type + API mode param
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the search API to support catalog/full_corpus/both modes.
acceptanceCriteria: UnifiedSearchResult discriminated union: source 'catalog' | 'full_corpus', shared description field
POST /api/admin/catalog/search accepts mode: catalog | full_corpus | both (default: catalog)
full_corpus calls match_video_index, both calls both RPCs and merges by similarity
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin search UI: full corpus toggle + bucket filter + URL params
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to toggle search modes with URL state persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Segmented toggle: Catalog Samples | Full Corpus | Both
Toggle auto-re-executes current query
Full Corpus: dataset filter replaced with bucket filter
URL params: ?q=, ?dataset=, ?bucket=, ?mode=
Full corpus cards: FULL CORPUS badge, bucket name, caption in description slot, enrichment_source tag, copy copies video_index.id
Full Corpus disabled if video_index empty

Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
